scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,tg-bot -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/tg-bot"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/tg-bot
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/tg-bot
scripts.format: npm run format -w apps/api && npm run format -w apps/web && npm run format -w apps/tg-bot
